differential_diagnoses: Common variable immunodeficiency (CVID) with associated enteropathy
Monoclonal B-cell lymphoproliferative disorder of the GI tract
next_steps: Surgical consultation for possible small bowel resection of aneurysmal jejunal segments
Full-thickness small bowel biopsy for histopathology, immunohistochemistry, and T-cell receptor gene rearrangement studies
Repeat immunoglobulin quantification and protein electrophoresis to reassess humoral status
CT-guided or surgical tissue sampling of mesenteric lymph nodes
Supportive care with blood transfusion and optimization of nutritional status
Re-evaluation of immunosuppressive therapy (infliximab) in the context of persistent, deteriorating bowel morphology
